label: Real Analysis
shortDescription: Rigorous foundations of calculus. Sequences, continuity, differentiation, integration, and metric spaces.
modulesDescription: Read the real-analysis chapters in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.
ogTitle: Learn Real Analysis for Free | CalcPath
ogDescription: Master rigorous real analysis: the real number system, sequences and series, limits and continuity with ε-δ definitions, differentiation and integration theorems, Lebesgue theory, metric spaces, and advanced topics — with ELI5 explanations, detailed worked examples, and targeted practice questions.
courseDescription: A complete introduction to real analysis providing the rigorous foundations of calculus. Covers construction and properties of real numbers, sequences and convergence, limits and continuity, the derivative and mean value theorems, Riemann and Lebesgue integration, metric spaces and compactness, plus advanced topics like functions of bounded variation and Fourier series. Each lesson includes intuitive ELI5 breakdowns, detailed worked examples, common pitfalls, and targeted practice questions.

topics.title: The Real Number System
topics.description: Construction and properties of the real numbers: completeness, order, density, Dedekind cuts, and cardinality.

topics.title: Sequences & Series
topics.description: Convergence of sequences, Cauchy sequences, infinite series, absolute convergence, and power series.

topics.title: Limits & Continuity
topics.description: ε-δ limits of functions, continuity, uniform continuity, and the intermediate and extreme value theorems.

topics.title: Differentiation
topics.description: The derivative, mean value theorem, Taylor approximations, and L'Hôpital's rule.

topics.title: Riemann Integration
topics.description: Riemann sums, the fundamental theorem of calculus, improper integrals, and Riemann–Stieltjes integration.

topics.title: Lebesgue Integration
topics.description: Measure-theoretic integration, convergence theorems, and the dominated convergence theorem.

topics.title: Metric Spaces & Topology
topics.description: Metric spaces, open and closed sets, compactness, completeness, connectedness, and fixed-point theorems.

topics.title: Advanced Topics
topics.description: Functions of bounded variation, absolute continuity, Lᵖ spaces, Fourier series, and rigorous multivariable calculus.
